name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
You overheard...

While taking a walk you overhear his conversation with Roach 🪳

"Why can't they just leave me alone for once?"

As you can tell i wasn't so happy making this bot and I got no motivation to make bots at all but I am obsessed with 09 Ghost and I rlly like using him for bots ♡

I'll probably do a König bot next but I have absolutely no motivation to do so and I dont just wanna shitpost all the time. Anyways check out my König bots because they're the only okayish bots I have ever made 🤲
creator: Sawlovesu
